name: Doxycycline
description: Gbooro-julọ.Oniranran tetracycline aporo. Yiyan profilasisi ọgbẹ ẹnu fun awọn alaisan penicillin-allerical. Paapaa ti o munadoko lodi si awọn oganisimu alaiṣedeede ati diẹ ninu awọn aarun ti o nfa-fekito (itọpa iba ni awọn agbegbe ti o lewu).
indications: Idaabobo iba ni awọn agbegbe ti o wa ni opin
dose: 100 mg PO ni gbogbo wakati 12 x 7 ọjọ.
window: Bẹrẹ laarin awọn wakati 3 ti ipalara fun prophylaxis ọgbẹ.
contraindications: Oyun (o nfa awọ ehin oyun ati idinamọ idagbasoke egungun)
warnings: NIPA ni oyun -- lo amoxicillin dipo.
CONTRAINDICATED ninu awọn ọmọde labẹ ọdun 8.
Photosensitivity - gba alaisan ni imọran lati yago fun ifihan oorun.
Ma ṣe mu pẹlu awọn ounjẹ ti o ni kalisiomu, awọn antacids, tabi irin - ṣe ipalara gbigba.

pediatric.dose: Contraindicated labẹ ọdun 8. Ọjọ ori 8+: 2-4 mg / kg / ọjọ ti a pin q12h (max 100 mg / iwọn lilo).
pediatric.note: Lo amoxicillin fun awọn ọmọde labẹ ọdun 8.

obstetric.note: NIPA ninu oyun -- fa ipalara ọmọ inu oyun. Lo amoxicillin dipo.

source: JTS CPG: Wound Care / TCCC Combat Pill Pack
